safest_plan.entry_basis: Zero 2026-06-22: wants ~4,000 tapped, then '4,000 taken out → 3.8' (~$3,800) before continued upside; matches the blue BUY demand band ~3,880–4,000 drawn on the 06-29 (4h) and 06-22 (1D) charts. Spot only, via physical allocated gold ETC, and only after a low-sweep then reclaim (Zero 2026-06-29).

targets.basis: 0.886+0.5 fib reaction zone visible on the 06-29 4h chart (~4,400) — first reclaim target if demand holds (estimated reaction level)
HTF VAH 'Full rotation implies $4,960' labelled on the 06-15 and 06-22 charts — long-term spot rotation target, contingent on accumulation resuming

safest_plan.stop_basis: Accepted daily/weekly close below the ~3,800 demand band without a reclaim — Zero 2026-06-29: 'failure to reclaim keeps it heavy.' ~3,700 sits just under the demand zone (estimated).

stance_by_source.summary: Gold broke below its low and the buy zone flipped into selling pressure; he wants a dip into the lows, taken out then reclaimed, before trusting it — 'not much to do yet', silver better positioned.
Becoming more appealing on spot; expects another tap of ~$4,000, ideally taken out toward ~$3,800, then a violent expansion higher — keep accumulating spot via physical gold ETC.
'Appealing now' — wants a sweep of the lows and a tap of demand around $4,000 to accumulate spot.
Accumulatory, setup valid (untriggered): long on a break+retest of the flip-high OR a sweep+reclaim of value-area-low ~4,300, targeting 4,800/5,000 — now stale after price fell to ~4,015.
Textbook continuation: already long from the value-area flip, scalp re-entry ~4,650–4,680, TP1 4,823 / full rotation 5,000 — entry levels long since broken below.
Earlier DCA/rotation accumulation 4,600–4,700 targeting 5,000–5,200 — superseded; price is ~600+ points below these zones.

conflicts: The newest read (29 Jun) says gold broke below its low and the demand 'became supply', directly downgrading the 5 Jun 'setup valid → 4,800/5,000' call; the newer macro view wins.

Chart correction: every earlier buy zone (VAL 4,600–4,700, DCA 4,600–4,700) and the 4,800/5,000 targets now sit far ABOVE the current ~4,015 price and are stale — the live demand is the ~3,800–4,000 blue zone on the 15/22/29 Jun charts, not the old levels in the extracted text.

Zero remains a long-term spot-accumulation bull (physical gold ETC) but tactically says there is 'not much to do yet' — the long-term bias and the short-term trigger disagree, so this is an accumulate-on-confirmation, not a clean entry.
plain_english: Gold has fallen hard to about $4,015 — roughly 20–30% off its highs — and has dropped straight through every buy level Zero flagged in the spring. His latest view (29 June) is cautious: the area he wanted to buy has flipped into selling pressure, so he wants to see price dip toward about $3,800, get bought back up, and hold before he trusts it again. He still likes gold as a long-term hold, bought as physical allocated gold so it stays halal, but he is clear there is nothing to do right now. Wait for that dip-and-recovery near $3,800 before adding, and ignore the old $4,800–5,000 targets — they are now out of date.
